email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Parttime Online marketeer Engels bij Actief Interim Schoten. Uw oproep voor een creatieve marketeer in een internationale, familiale omgeving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites met Elementor. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data, GEO en technische SEO-audits. Mijn kennis van grafisch design (Canva) en contentmanagement maakt mij geschikt voor het ontwerpen van visuals en brochures.

Ik werk dagelijks in het Engels en spreek daarnaast Turks (moedertaal) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding). De combinatie van marketing, design en techniek, plus de flexibele parttime invulling, spreekt mij zeer aan.

Ik kom graag langs om mijn motivatie en portfolio verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Parttime Online Marketeer English position at Actief Interim Schoten. Your call for a creative marketer in an international, family-like environment perfectly matches my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites with Elementor. Additionally, my own project mirook.com has given me experience with structured data, GEO, and technical SEO audits. My knowledge of graphic design (Canva) and content management makes me suitable for designing visuals and brochures.

I work daily in English and also speak Turkish (native) and Dutch (B1, currently studying). The combination of marketing, design, and technology, plus the flexible part-time schedule, appeals to me greatly.

I would be happy to visit and further discuss my motivation and portfolio.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Parttime Online marketeer Engels bij Actief Interim Schoten. Uw oproep voor een creatieve marketeer in een internationale, familiale omgeving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto (2026-heden) voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites met Elementor en het Astra-thema. Ik gebruik tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te monitoren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren. Mijn kennis van grafisch design (Canva) en contentmanagement maakt mij geschikt voor het ontwerpen van visuals, brochures en marketingmateriaal.

Uw bedrijf, een internationale speler in sensortechnologie met een klein team van 5 collega's, spreekt mij zeer aan. De combinatie van marketing, design en techniek, plus de flexibele parttime invulling (16u/week) met mogelijkheid tot thuiswerk, past perfect bij mijn wensen. Ik werk dagelijks in het Engels en spreek daarnaast Turks (moedertaal) en Nederlands (B1, in opleiding). Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn rol verder uit te breiden naar sales of HR, zoals u aanbiedt.

Ik kom graag langs om mijn motivatie en portfolio verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Parttime Online Marketeer English position at Actief Interim Schoten. Your call for a creative marketer in an international, family-like environment perfectly matches my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto (2026-present), I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites with Elementor and the Astra theme. I use tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to monitor performance. Additionally, my own project mirook.com has given me experience with structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. My knowledge of graphic design (Canva) and content management makes me suitable for designing visuals, brochures, and marketing materials.

Your company, an international player in sensor technology with a small team of 5 colleagues, appeals to me greatly. The combination of marketing, design, and technology, plus the flexible part-time schedule (16h/week) with the possibility of working from home, fits my wishes perfectly. I work daily in English and also speak Turkish (native) and Dutch (B1, currently studying). I am motivated to expand my role into sales or HR, as you offer.

I would be happy to visit and further discuss my motivation and portfolio.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Junior Digital Marketer with hands-on SEO, content, and WordPress experience (Episto, 2026–present)
• Strong graphic design skills (Canva) for visuals, brochures, and marketing materials
• International work environment: daily English communication, Turkish native, Dutch B1
• Experience with technical SEO, structured data, and GEO for AI search visibility (mirook.com)
• Flexible, autonomous, and eager to grow into sales or HR support
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Graphic design: Canva, visual content creation, brochure and marketing material design
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
